original_question:
Given the system of inequalities \\( \begin{cases} x^{2}-x-2 > 0 \\\\ 2x^{2}+(5+2k)x+5k < 0\\end{cases} \\) only contains the integer solution \\(-2\\), find the range of values for \\(k\\).

Present the answer in LaTex format: \boxed{Your answer}
